gaps: No test case covers the Home Screen UI rendering of the paired device's headset image for any device model.
No test case validates device-specific asset loading for Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20 on the Home Screen.
No test case covers the post-pairing Home Screen state — all existing tests focus on onboarding/EULA/permissions flows, not the main app screen after a device is connected.
No test case checks for missing/misloaded graphical assets (headset images) on the Home Screen across different device models.
No lifecycle or state-transition tests exist for the Home Screen after pairing completes.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-001: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image renders correctly on Home Screen after pairing
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen (main screen showing the paired device).
Verify the headset image/illustration for Voyager Free 60+ is displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen displays the correct Voyager Free 60+ headset image asset. No placeholder, broken image icon, or blank space is shown. Actual (If Bug): Image is missing — a grey placeholder or empty frame appears instead of the device-specific graphic.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-002: Voyager Free 20 — Headset image renders correctly on Home Screen after pairing
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 20 is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen (main screen showing the paired device).
Verify the headset image/illustration for Voyager Free 20 is displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen displays the correct Voyager Free 20 headset image asset. No placeholder, broken image icon, or blank space is shown. Actual (If Bug): Image is missing — a grey placeholder or empty frame appears instead of the device-specific graphic.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-003: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image persists after app backgrounding and foregrounding
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected.
Launch app and confirm the headset image is visible on Home Screen.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen the app from the recent apps list.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 60+ headset image remains visible and correctly rendered after foregrounding. Actual (If Bug): Image area is blank or shows a broken asset after app resume.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-004: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image persists after app force-kill and relaunch
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected.
Launch app and confirm the headset image is visible on Home Screen.
Force-kill the app (swipe away from recent apps).
Relaunch the app.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 60+ headset image is displayed correctly after app relaunch. Actual (If Bug): Image fails to load on cold start — placeholder or empty asset area shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-005: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image persists after Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected. App is open on Home Screen with headset image visible.
Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off Bluetooth on phone or put earbuds in case and close lid).
Wait 5 seconds.
Reconnect Bluetooth (turn Bluetooth back on or open case lid).
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: After Bluetooth reconnection, the Voyager Free 60+ headset image is displayed correctly. Actual (If Bug): Image area is blank or shows a placeholder after the Bluetooth state transition.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-006: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image renders correctly after phone rotation
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected.
Launch app and confirm the headset image is visible on Home Screen in portrait mode.
Rotate phone to landscape.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
Rotate back to portrait.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 60+ headset image renders correctly in both orientations without distortion, stretching, or disappearing. Actual (If Bug): Image fails to re-render after config change — blank area or incorrect scaling appears.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-007: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image renders correctly after phone reboot
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected.
Launch app and confirm the headset image is visible on Home Screen.
Reboot the phone.
After reboot, ensure Bluetooth is on and Voyager Free 60+ reconnects automatically.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: After phone reboot and app cold launch, the Voyager Free 60+ headset image is displayed correctly. Actual (If Bug): Image asset fails to load after device reboot — placeholder or empty area shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-008: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image renders correctly after switching from another paired device
steps: Precondition: Both Voyager Free 60+ and a second Poly device (e.g., Voyager Surround 80 UC) are paired with the phone.
Connect Voyager Surround 80 UC. Launch app and confirm its headset image is shown on Home Screen.
Disconnect Voyager Surround 80 UC and connect Voyager Free 60+.
Observe the Home Screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home Screen updates to show the Voyager Free 60+ headset image. No stale image from the previous device remains. Actual (If Bug): Previous device's image persists or a blank placeholder appears instead of the correct Free 60+ asset.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-009: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image loads correctly on initial pairing flow completion
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is in pairing mode. App is on the onboarding/pairing screen.
Complete the pairing flow (scan, select device, confirm pairing).
Observe the Home Screen immediately after pairing completes.
generated_testcases.expected: Immediately after pairing completes and the Home Screen appears, the Voyager Free 60+ headset image is displayed. No loading spinner, placeholder, or blank area is shown. Actual (If Bug): Post-pairing Home Screen shows a blank image area or generic placeholder instead of the device-specific graphic.

generated_testcases.title: TC-HOME-IMG-010: Voyager Free 60+ — Headset image asset asymmetry vs Voyager Free 20
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is paired and connected.
Launch app and capture/screenshot the Home Screen headset image.
Disconnect Voyager Free 60+ and connect Voyager Free 20.
Launch app and capture/screenshot the Home Screen headset image.
Compare the two images visually.
generated_testcases.expected: The headset image for Voyager Free 60+ is visually distinct from the Voyager Free 20 image. Each device shows its unique form factor illustration. Actual (If Bug): Both devices show the same generic earbud image, or one device shows a mismatched asset (e.g., Free 20 image shown for Free 60+).
